primary_diagnosis.rationale: Final diagnosis explicitly states 'Acute Myocardial Infarction (STEMI - Anterior Wall)'. ICD-10 I21.9 is the correct unspecified AMI code. ST-elevation pattern and Troponin elevation corroborate the diagnosis. No ambiguity — code confirmed.
